info.title: Eliza Merge Steward API
info.description: Private control API for Eliza Hub agent coordination, project boards, merge queue stewardship, durable run state, and Forgejo webhook ingestion.

get.summary: Return process health.
Return readiness checks and runtime configuration status.
Return the machine-readable OpenAPI contract.
Return the agent and Eliza Cloud discovery manifest.
Return Prometheus-compatible steward metrics when metrics are enabled.
Return the dashboard workflow card view.
Return the explicit GitHub, Forgejo, and Eliza Hub parity matrix.
Return the production launch readiness checklist and private evidence requirements.
Return the ordered production cutover plan derived from the hard evidence gate.
Return a schema-valid, non-passing production evidence template for private cutover assembly.
Return the Eliza agent Kanban board view.
Return merge queue lane summaries, diagnostics, and selected integration plans.
Search steward repo context with natural query text for agent and Eliza Cloud clients.

post.summary: Search steward repo context plus caller-supplied issue, diff, or Actions-log documents.

get.summary: Return a deterministic repo release and merge-window readiness gate.
Return a repo branch-protection and required-check audit for live agent merges.
Return advisory routing, stale-work, and overlap insights for agents.
Return agent workload, health, open slots, and assignment suggestions.
List steward-registered agent identities used by strict agent merge policy.

post.summary: Register or update an allowed agent identity. OIDC callers must be steward admins.

get.summary: Fetch one steward-registered agent identity.

post.summary: Disable a steward-registered agent identity. OIDC callers must be steward admins.

get.summary: Return per-agent performance, throughput, stale-claim, and handoff signals.
Return compact next-assignment recommendations and blocked-agent reasons.

post.summary: Classify CI failure logs into agent-routable blockers and next actions.
Plan safe scoped validation commands before agents consume shared runner capacity.
Build a deterministic PR review brief with risk, verification, work-reservation coverage, commit hygiene, and reviewer routing.
Suggest reviewer and owner agents from changed paths, affected packages, active claims, capacity, and performance evidence.
Predict same-file, same-package, active-claim, and migration conflict risk for proposed patch facts before an agent opens a PR.

get.summary: Generate deterministic release notes from merged queue items.

post.summary: Generate deterministic release notes from supplied merged PR facts.

get.summary: Return the owner-agent action feed.
Return a read-only startup snapshot with identity status, policy hints, resolved links, inbox/routing summaries, claims, and safe next actions for one agent.
Return a one-call situational agent cockpit with workflow operations, work context, focus cards, and next actions.

post.summary: Decide whether an agent may submit more work, including strict Work-item, work-reservation, identity, and branch-namespace checks when requested or configured.
Check proposed agent work for active claims, overlapping PRs, hot files, and agent branch-namespace ownership before starting.
Reserve proposed agent work by running preflight, enforcing configured branch namespaces, and creating durable claims in one request.
Claim the next assignment suggested by the capacity view.
Claim or preview the next insight-ranked unit of work.

get.summary: Return compact queue, claim, run, and hot-path coordination state.
List steward runs.

post.summary: Create or update a steward run.

get.summary: Read one steward run.
Read derived run state.
List run nodes.

post.summary: Create or update a run node.

get.summary: List attempts for a run.

post.summary: Start an attempt for a run.

get.summary: List run events, optionally after a sequence number.

post.summary: Append a run event.

get.summary: Read one attempt by id.

post.summary: Refresh an active attempt heartbeat.
Mark an attempt succeeded.
Mark an attempt failed.
Cancel an attempt.
Claim a stale attempt for recovery.

get.summary: List approval records.

post.summary: Create or update an approval request.
Approve, deny, or otherwise decide an approval request.

get.summary: List maintainer input requests.

post.summary: Create a maintainer input request.

get.summary: Read one maintainer input request by id.

post.summary: Respond to a maintainer input request.

get.summary: List external signals.

post.summary: Append an external signal.
Mark an external signal consumed.

get.summary: List active and historical agent work claims.

post.summary: Create or renew an agent work claim.

get.summary: Read one agent work claim by id.

post.summary: Renew an agent work claim.
Release an agent work claim.
Transfer a claim from one owner agent to another.

get.summary: List repo queue policies.

post.summary: Create or update a repo queue policy.

get.summary: Read one repo queue policy.
Return the read-only merge train execution plan selected by current queue policy.
List raw queue state.

post.summary: Evaluate policy for one queue item.
Evaluate and schedule queue items.
Simulate queue policy and integration-plan impact for proposed items without mutating queue state.
Claim the next queue item for a worker.

get.summary: Read one queue item by id.
Read derived run state for a queue item.

post.summary: Mark a queue item finished.
Mark a queue item failed.
Apply an audited policy override to a queue item.
Clear an audited policy override.

get.summary: Plan an integration batch from current queue state.

post.summary: Plan an integration batch for explicit items.
Execute an integration batch when explicitly confirmed.
Run one guarded merge worker cycle when explicitly confirmed.
Render a queue status comment payload.
Ingest a signed Forgejo webhook delivery.
Build an agent action plan
post.description: Composes bootstrap, inbox, routing, repo search, preflight, validation budget, submission, conflict, and review evidence into a read-only next-action plan for one agent.

get.summary: List durable Eliza Steward work items for agent intake and Kanban clients.

post.summary: Create or update a durable agent work item.

get.summary: Get one durable work item by id.

post.summary: Move a durable work item to a new agent workflow state.

get.summary: List durable Eliza Work cycles for agent planning views.

post.summary: Create or update a durable Eliza Work cycle.

get.summary: Get one durable Eliza Work cycle by id.

post.summary: Move a durable Eliza Work cycle to a new planning state.

get.summary: List durable Eliza Work modules for agent planning views.

post.summary: Create or update a durable Eliza Work module.

get.summary: Get one durable Eliza Work module by id.

post.summary: Move a durable Eliza Work module to a new planning state.

get.summary: Compute progress snapshots across Eliza Work items, cycles, and modules.
List durable Eliza Work saved views.

post.summary: Create or update a durable Eliza Work saved view.

get.summary: Get one durable Eliza Work saved view by id.
Evaluate one persisted Eliza Work saved view into list, Kanban, and page rows.

post.summary: Evaluate an inline or persisted Eliza Work saved view without mutating steward state.
Move a durable Eliza Work saved view to a new lifecycle state.

get.summary: Compute Eliza Work dashboard snapshots from built-in and saved views.
Preview queue-to-work intake automation

post.summary: Apply a confirmed queue-to-work intake plan

get.summary: List durable Eliza Work pages for agent plans, runbooks, specs, decisions, notes, and release notes.

post.summary: Create or update a durable Eliza Work page linked to agent work.

get.summary: Get one durable Eliza Work page by id.

post.summary: Move a durable Eliza Work page to a new lifecycle state.

get.summary: Return the agent-readable fleet coordination contract.
Return an agent-scoped resume packet composed from current work, queue, and coordination state.
Return a read-only action plan for one existing queue item.

GithubParity.description: GitHub, Forgejo, and Eliza Hub parity response.

WorkViewEvaluation.description: Evaluated Eliza Work saved view response.

ProductionEvidence.title: Eliza Hub Production Evidence
ProductionEvidence.description: Structural schema for private evidence consumed by the Merge Steward production gate. This validates evidence shape; the production gate enforces pass/fail semantics.
